{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212200031B02B18352731921015F"}"},"total":81},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7179535976811954983","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"嗯，节奏跌宕起伏，一定要写下去啊！（迫害团长）比较喜欢一点一点把基业打下的感觉，千万不要太快啊，太快的引起注意看久了观感不是很好，加油[思考][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671616101,"group_id":"7169572724820413440","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"那个屠魔的少年终究成魔੭ ᐕ)੭*⁾⁾","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/NcT8+VL2W7HK2dtYiCBl8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cad08e96e8d44deaa91e7220c180f4ba~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616061&x-signature=5CHb6nZta%2FVqhi3y4Owq9rVfuiQ%3D","user_id":"102806830539","user_name":"百合她不香吗(｡>∀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102806830539","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7169572724820413440","book_info":{"abstract":"“野狗不需要墓碑，在路上狂奔到腐烂就好。”
萧恩穿越到了赛博朋克边缘行者世界，获得超级AI【红皇后】主板！
于是，他开始在资本财阀横行的赛博世界里，打造属于自己的企业神话！
……
【红皇后：请问是否开展天启计划？】
大卫：“我可是蓝伞名下的传奇雇佣兵！”
露西：“萧恩，在月球上也能有桃花源吗？”
葛洛丽亚：“BOSS，这是公司这个月的财政报表！”
丽贝卡：“呀哈哈哈，萧恩！我要在荒板塔上开个洞！”
女V：“我为公司做了这么多，你就只想和我拜把子？”
杰克：“街头的杂碎们听好了，敢闹唐人街者，虽远必诛！”
我，萧恩——保护伞公司创始人！
一起加入光荣的进化吧！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o639b9f4fa6af38089e00b54a867920f9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"丑五","author_id":"","book_id":"7169572724820413440","book_name":"我，屑狗？！保护伞公司创始人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e078","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7169572831515935232","read_count":"576","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"329054"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.8","serial_count":"141","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2f4ec5c4a6e9011bde06eb0d934689cf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285603&x-signature=MBZLI1Zf9Ij8lP3r21p%2B%2BZRMoHs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1874006882656452","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.361112e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212200031B02B18352731921015F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6361,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":4534},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1671616558,"author_reply_time":1671616738,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7189352446630560573","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"同人文爽文居多的情况下这类慢热一点的剧情确实是会刷掉很多人，再加上作者对于龙国组织的这种二创和前期的轻微虐主行为和金手指不明显这些问题都刺激着想看爽文人的耐心。但是慢慢读到后面其实整体剧情挺流畅的，对于主角各个阶段的心里变化和一些成长的描写也挺细致的，剧情方面也是挖了不少坑脱离了原动漫和游戏，关于龙国组织那后面其实不是很好写，要有所接触还不能接触太多盖过了本书的主题赛博朋克，描写过多跑题整体剧情就烂了，描写的太少前面挖的坑还不太好填，期待本作的后续吧，评分虽然不是很高但是对于能看下去的人来说还不错","text_exts":[{"e":38,"s":36,"text":"于龙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%8E%E9%BE%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741016031921015F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227189352446630560573%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227169572724820413440%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%8E%E9%BE%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":188,"s":184,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741016031921015F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227189352446630560573%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227169572724820413440%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673902010,"group_id":"7169572724820413440","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_use
